page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.3xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the ecs.u2i utility family. It is powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance features 12 physical cores with 12 vCPUs, utilizing a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration that ensures dedicated CPU allocation without hyperthreading. It is equipped with 24.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 2.0 GB of RAM per core.

This server type does not include bundled local storage, requiring external block storage volumes for operating system and data storage needs. It operates on the KVM hypervisor and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. There are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with this instance.

With a 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, this instance is structured for compute-heavy workloads that do not require massive memory footprints. The dedicated core allocation provides predictable compute performance, making it suitable for batch processing, web serving, application servers, and moderate computational tasks. The lack of local storage and specialized GPU hardware positions this instance as a cost-efficient option for stateless compute nodes and distributed microservices where storage is decoupled.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.3xlarge is an x86_64 compute-oriented server instance powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon processor operating at 2.7 GHz. It features 12 physical cores and 12 vCPUs with a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, providing dedicated CPU allocation. The instance is equipped with 24.0 GB of RAM, establishing a 1:2 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 2.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage, relying entirely on external network-attached storage, and operates on the KVM hypervisor with an 8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. This hardware profile is designed for stateless compute workloads, application servers, and distributed processing tasks that require predictable CPU performance without high memory or local storage demands.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m2.3xlarge is a KVM-based server with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 24 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for stateless compute workloads.

tagline: A dedicated twelve-core Intel Xeon compute instance with twenty-four gigabytes of memory and eight gigabits baseline network bandwidth.

24.0 GB of system memory providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth on a KVM hypervisor
No bundled local storage, requiring external block storage
Optimized for stateless compute, application servers, and batch processing
